title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 233.030 - General road law — exceptions
text:
233.030.  General road law — exceptions. — The general road law in force in such county shall remain in force in such districts, except wherein the provisions thereof shall be in conflict with the provisions of sections 233.010 to 233.165.
(RSMo 1939 § 8701) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 8052; 1919 § 10828; 1909 § 10606
